title: How can I avoid being notified about actions I initiated?
excerpt:

posts.author: mfriedma (Michael Friedman)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have an automation that if I create a prospect I am Assigned the prospect.

Every time I do this I get a notification. That’s silly - I created the prospect and I do not need a notification to tell me it is now assigned to me. But if someone else assigns the prospect to me I want a notification.

This needs to work for everyone - so we only get notifications is someone else assigns the prospect to us.

How can we do this?
